stemHtml:
Refer to figure or E(LO)6 chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
You are doing a VFR flight from VALENCIA (VLC) VOR/DME (39°29'N 000°29'W) to ALMERIA (AMR) VOR/DME (36°49'N, 002°15'W). The LE(R)-63 is not activated and you choose to fly an ATS conditional route. What is the best route?

options.c: VLC - B28 - R47- BLN - M192 - AMR
options.d: VLC - A34 - ALT - W810 - VSJ - W820 - AMR
